name_en: Exclusive New Arrival 🆕🆕 YSL Saint Laurent has released a bestseller ❗❗ The Saint Laurent shoulder bag, which is already very popular in the fashion world, can be used as a handbag with the crocodile leather strap. It is another bestseller, exuding a charming aura inside and out. The bag has 4 card slots, and the front pocket can hold ✨ paired with exquisite craftsmanship 😖 The quality lives up to expectations. Model=26607, Size 22x15.5x6cm
